text: Artificial intelligence, or AI, is the ability of machines to perform tasks that normally require human intelligence. This includes learning, problem-solving, and decision-making. One important part of AI is machine learning, where computers improve their performance by analyzing data instead of following fixed instructions. A more advanced type is deep learning, which uses neural networks to process information in a way similar to the human brain. Today, AI has many applications in daily life. For example, it helps virtual assistants like Siri understand your voice, recommends shows on streaming services, and assists doctors in diagnosing diseases.
